更新

Weasley J

版本升级

1. OSS文件存储Controller

1.1. 获取OSS文件上传服务端签名

URL: http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/oss/policy

Type: GET

Author: liuwenjing

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 获取OSS文件上传服务端签名

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

message

string

返回消息

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

code

int32

状态码

-

data

object

响应数据

-

└─accessId

string

你的accessKeyId

-

└─policy

string

策略

-

└─signature

string

签名

-

└─dir

string

user-dir-prefix/

-

└─host

string

"https://" + bucket + "." + endpoint

-

└─expire

string

过期时间

-

└─callbackUrl

string

设置上传回调URL，即回调服务器地址，用于处理应用服务器与OSS之间的通信。
OSS会在文件上传完成后，把文件上传信息通过此回调URL发送给应用服务器。
本例中修改为：String callbackUrl ="http://11.22.33.44:1234"

-

Response-example:

{
	"message": "success",
	"success": true,
	"timestamp": "2021-06-26 04:25:16",
	"code": 93,
	"data": {
		"accessId": "149",
		"policy": "vj3pjl",
		"signature": "2r6vbn",
		"dir": "4t1op0",
		"host": "uty82d",
		"expire": "n49fe8",
		"callbackUrl": "www.xn---xn--qw5a-k00wi21r.name"
	}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/oss/policy

2. 短信Controller

2.1. 发送验证码给用户手机

URL: http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/sms/sendCode

Type: GET

Author: Weasley J

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 发送验证码给用户手机

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

phone

string

true

接收验证码的手机号

origin

int32

true

No comments found.

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

message

string

返回消息

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

code

int32

状态码

-

data

object

响应数据

-

Response-example:

{
	"message": "success",
	"success": true,
	"timestamp": "2021-06-26 04:25:16",
	"code": 725,
	"data": true
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/sms/sendCode?origin=0&phone=15768305292

2.2. 查询短信发送详情

URL: http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/sms/sendStatus

Type: GET

Author: Weasley J

Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded;charset=utf-8

Description: 查询短信发送详情

Query-parameters:

ParameterValueTypeRequiredDescription

telephone

string

true

接收验证码的手机号

sendDate

string

true

发送日期

Response-fields:

FieldTypeDescriptionSince

message

string

返回消息

-

success

boolean

是否成功

-

timestamp

string

响应时间戳

-

code

int32

状态码

-

data

object

响应数据

-

└─requestId

string

No comments found.

-

└─code

string

No comments found.

-

└─message

string

No comments found.

-

└─totalCount

string

No comments found.

-

└─smsSendDetailDTOs

array

No comments found.

-

Response-example:

{
	"message": "success",
	"success": true,
	"timestamp": "2021-06-26 04:25:16",
	"code": 143,
	"data": {
		"requestId": "149",
		"code": "86116",
		"message": "success",
		"totalCount": "yt7lfl",
		"smsSendDetailDTOs": [
			{
				"object": "any object"
			}
		]
	}
}

Curl-example:

curl -X GET -i http://127.0.0.1:88/api/thirdparty/sms/sendStatus?sendDate=2021-06-26&telephone=15768305292
Generated by smart-doc at 2021-06-26 04:25:15Suggestions,contact,support and error reporting on Gitee or Github
